items.title: Taking Stock: Market rebounds from day's low amid AI woes; Nifty above 25,750
items.description: The Nifty IT index plunged 6 percent, marking its biggest single-day fall since April 4, 2025, as stocks such as Infosys, TCS, Tech Mahindra, HCL Technologies and Wipro came under heavy pressure. On the other hand, auto, energy, consumer durables, PSU, realty, metal, oil & gas and power advanced 1–2 percent.

items.title: Sigachi Industries shares rally 20% after CEO gets bail in factory blast case
items.description: Sigachi Industries share price: After hitting a 52-week high of Rs 59.59 apiece in June last year, the stock tumbled more than 68% in around eight months to hit a fresh 52-week low of Rs 18.92 apiece day before yesterday.
